{{ config(materialized='table') }}

SELECT
    s_opp.id AS "Id",
    COALESCE(TRIM(s_opp.name), 'Unknown Opportunity') AS "Name",
    CASE
        WHEN TRIM(s_opp.stagename) IN ('Prospecting', 'Qualification', 'Needs Analysis', 'Value Proposition', 'Id. Decision Makers', 'Perception Analysis', 'Proposal/Price Quote', 'Negotiation/Review', 'Closed Won', 'Closed Lost')
        THEN TRIM(s_opp.stagename)
        ELSE 'Prospecting' -- Default for invalid or NULL stagename
    END AS "StageName",
    COALESCE(
        TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(s_opp.closedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(s_opp.closedate, 'MM/DD/YYYY'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(s_opp.closedate, 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        '1900-01-01' -- Default date for unparseable or NULL closedate
    ) AS "CloseDate",
    CASE
        WHEN s_opp.amount ~ '^[0-9]+([.,][0-9]+)?$'
        THEN REPLACE(REPLACE(s_opp.amount, '.', ''), ',', '.')::DOUBLE PRECISION
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "Amount",
    s_opp.currencyisocode AS "CurrencyIsoCode",
    s_opp.accountid AS "AccountId",
    s_opp.id AS "Legacy_Opportunity_ID__c",
    NULL::TEXT AS "CreatedDate", -- Not available in source, defaulting to NULL as target allows
    NULL::TEXT AS "LastModifiedDate", -- Not available in source, defaulting to NULL as target allows
